entry.em: ..EXTREME HEAT WARNING IN EFFECT UNTIL 8 PM CDT FRIDAY

entry.data:
SUNNY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE LOWER 90S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 106

MOSTLY CLEAR
HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 108 IN THE AFTERNOON

CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY, HOT WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 90S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH
HIGHEST HEAT INDEX READINGS HEAT INDEX READINGS UP TO 106 IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE MID 70S
HIGHS IN THE MID 90S

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
LOWS IN THE MID 70S

MOSTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 90S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT
